g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the income account model')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the checking account model')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the savings account model')
sendPrompt('How should recurring spending be modelled?')
sendPrompt('How should irregular spending be modelled?')
sendPrompt('How should big occasional spending be modelled?')
sendPrompt('How does the simulation clock drive transaction generation?')
sendPrompt('What noise and drift models should be used?')
sendPrompt('How should inflation be modelled per category?')
sendPrompt('What life events should the simulator support?')
sendPrompt('What should the transactions output schema look like?')
sendPrompt('What should the account balances time series look like?')
sendPrompt('What configuration options should the generator expose?')

svg.text: Coherence constraint: balance = Σ deposits − Σ withdrawals at every point in time
No negative balances · Spending gated on available funds · Big purchases require savings build-up
